testcase.name: completeMissionSimulation
testcase.system-err:
[main] INFO com.natwest.oceanexplorer.core.Probe - Probe initialized at (0, 0) facing NORTH ↑ [main] INFO com.natwest.oceanexplorer.api.ProbeController - Probe MISSION-001 initialized at position (0, 0) facing NORTH ↑ [main] INFO com.natwest.oceanexplorer.api.ProbeController - Executing 17 commands on probe MISSION-001 [main] INFO com.natwest.oceanexplorer.integration.OceanExplorerIntegrationTest - Mission completed: ======================================== EXPLORATION REPORT - Probe MISSION-001 Generated: Fri Mar 27 22:48:51 IST 2026 ========================================
EXPLORATION STATISTICS: ----------------------- total distance traveled : 11.0 unique positions visited : 11 revisit count : 1 exploration efficiency : 0.9166666666666666 command success rate : 1.0
COMMAND STATISTICS: ------------------- LEFT - Executions: 3, Success Rate: 100.00% FORWARD - Executions: 10, Success Rate: 100.00% RIGHT - Executions: 3, Success Rate: 100.00% BACKWARD - Executions: 1, Success Rate: 100.00%
EXPLORATION PATH (last 10 positions): ------------------------------------ (0, 2) (1, 2) (2, 2) (2, 3) (2, 4) (3, 4) (2, 4) (1, 4) (0, 4) (0, 5)
========================================

testcase.name: concurrentCommandExecution

testcase.name: boundaryNavigationTest
